emails.subject: Re: What happened with the NDA?
emails.body: Re: What happened with the NDA? If the NDA is the Confidentiality Agreement for the Energy Trading Platform (group of six?), I have marked it up with only those revisions I thought essential (having discussed them with Andy) and am now waiting to hear back regarding where I should send it (have left voice mail for Greg and Andy is checking). If the NDA is something else, please let me know. Louise Kitchen 05/16/2000 06:10 AM

emails.subject: Re: What happened with the NDA?
emails.body: Please send to Paul Addis at AEP, I lefft you a voicemail on Monday with his number Tel 614 223 1315 Fax 614 223 1331 I would also like to see a copy as it is going to be very difficult making changes with 6 companies having to approve it.. What exactly are the changes? Andy has my fax number From: Mark Taylor on 05/16/2000 04:38 PM
